title: Add or Subtract 10 or 100
description: Adjust a number by 10 or 100 by changing the tens or hundreds digit.
condition: Expression of the form n ± 10 or n ± 100.
response: Increase or decrease the tens or hundreds digit accordingly.
label: Principle / Model

title: Add Using Make-a-Hundred Compensation
description: Add numbers by decomposing one addend to make a friendly hundred, then add the remaining part.
condition: Addition of multi-digit numbers where one addend is close to a multiple of 100 (e.g., 297 + 613).
response: Decompose one addend to make a friendly hundred (e.g., 297 + 3 = 300), add the remaining amount, and compute the total.
label: Principle / Model

title: Find Missing Subtrahend
description: Solve equations of the form a = b − x by subtracting a from b.
condition: Equation structured as a = b − x, where x is unknown.
label: Rule / Plan
notes: Uses inverse relationship of addition and subtraction.

title: Solve Additive Compare (Fewer)
description: Interpret 'fewer than' in word problems as subtraction.
condition: Word problem stating a quantity is k fewer than another quantity.
response: Subtract k from the reference quantity.
label: Rule / Plan
example: If there are 63 students and 48 fewer teachers, compute $63 - 48 = 15$.
